"Yes, short streams (generally under 5–10 minutes) can disrupt Twitch watch streaks , as they may not register properly in tracking. To count, streams usually need to be long enough to generate a VOD, and for, and for, and for, and for viewers, each stream should ideally be over 10 minutes, with at least 30 minutes between them. "
